creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
diff -ru glpk.orig/Makefile glpk/Makefile
--- glpk.orig/Makefile  Sat Aug 25 07:26:24 2007
+++ glpk/Makefile       Sat Aug 25 07:30:34 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=      glpk
-PORTVERSION=   4.17
+PORTVERSION=   4.20
 CATEGORIES=    math
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    glpk
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@
 CFLAGS+=       -trigraphs
 
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-PORTDOCS=      bench.txt bench1.txt glpk.ps glpk_faq.txt
+PORTDOCS=      bench.txt bench1.txt glpk.ps glpk_faq.txt gmpl.ps opb.txt
 .endif
 
 post-install:
diff -ru glpk.orig/distinfo glpk/distinfo
--- glpk.orig/distinfo  Sat Aug 25 07:26:24 2007
+++ glpk/distinfo       Sat Aug 25 07:30:34 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (glpk-4.17.tar.gz) = aa76153b7d506154cb7ccf8cf3695c2c
-SHA256 (glpk-4.17.tar.gz) = 2fec389487e3f2b62ba881aa292bcffd300effb216ff315d48afd7074d4db2ff
-SIZE (glpk-4.17.tar.gz) = 1350306
+MD5 (glpk-4.20.tar.gz) = 6dd68d9eef35c524489f3e935a0dae34
+SHA256 (glpk-4.20.tar.gz) = 095f6276db06405f4a4a103e08fef1ddf5bbc5fd8686e1fe50dac52b8ea7b386
+SIZE (glpk-4.20.tar.gz) = 1383676
diff -ru glpk.orig/pkg-plist glpk/pkg-plist
--- glpk.orig/pkg-plist Sat Aug 25 07:26:24 2007
+++ glpk/pkg-plist      Sat Aug 25 07:30:34 2007
@@ -1,7 +1,6 @@
 bin/glpsol
-bin/tspsol
 include/glpk.h
 lib/libglpk.a
 lib/libglpk.la
 lib/libglpk.so
-lib/libglpk.so.2
+lib/libglpk.so.5
